creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
Typically something like

https://download.gnome.org/sources/seahorse/40.0/seahorse-40.0.tar.xz

needs to be

https://download.gnome.org/sources/seahorse/40/seahorse-40.0.tar.xz

Here's a shortlist from my poudriere, but I think this change affects a lot of ports...

security/seahorse
deskutils/gnome-todo
games/gnome-sudoku
graphics/eog
editors/gedit
math/gnome-calculator
accessibility/orca
x11/yelp
